svg.title: Estimated digital advertising revenue by platform origin (India, FY24-25)
svg.desc: Estimated digital advertising revenue by platform origin (India, FY24-25). Source: Meta / Google India ROC filings; domestic estimate. Foreign-platform figures from ROC filings; domestic share is an illustrative estimate.
